# vmnet_operation_mode_key | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ vmnet ](/documentation/vmnet)

- [ vmnet_operation_mode_key ](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_operation_mode_key)

-  vmnet_operation_mode_key 

Global Variable# vmnet_operation_mode_key

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.10+

```
let vmnet_operation_mode_key: UnsafePointer<CChar>
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_operation_mode_key#Discussion)

The mode in which the guest operating system network interface is configured.

The supported modes are defined at `vmnet`.

The value specified for this key should be of type doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/xpc/xpc_type_uint64.
